<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Alejandro Salgado Lopez| Resume</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: #0b0f14;
      --panel: #111827;
      --panel-2: #0f172a;
      --line: #334155;
      --text: #e5e7eb;
      --muted: #94a3b8;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255,255,255,0.08), transparent 35%),
        radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(255,255,255,0.06), transparent 30%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, #030712 0%, #111827 45%, #1f2937 100%);
      color: var(--text);
    }
    a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
    .wrap { max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 40px 24px 56px; }
    .langbar { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .switch {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 18px;
      background: rgba(17,24,39,.92); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }
    .switch span { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); padding: 0 6px; }
    .btn {
      border: 1px solid var(--line); background: #1f2937; color: #cbd5e1;
      border-radius: 14px; padding: 10px 16px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;
      cursor: pointer; transition: .25s ease;
    }
    .btn.active { background: #e5e7eb; color: #111827; border-color: #d1d5db; box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.25); }
    .btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .grid-top { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.15fr .85fr; gap: 28px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .stack { display: grid; gap: 28px; }
    .card {
      position: relative; border: 1px solid var(--line);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(17,24,39,.96), rgba(15,23,42,.96));
      border-radius: 28px; padding: 28px; box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
      transition: transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease, border-color .3s ease;
    }
    .card.selectable { cursor: pointer; }
    .card.selectable:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.28); }
    .card.active {
      transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.01);
      border-color: rgba(229,231,235,.7); box-shadow: 0 24px 56px rgba(0,0,0,.35);
      outline: 2px solid rgba(229,231,235,.18);
    }
    h1 { font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 68px); line-height: .95; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.04em; }
    h2 { margin: 0 0 18px; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.1; }
    h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 18px; }
    p { margin: 0; }
    .headline { margin-top: 14px; max-width: 760px; color: var(--muted); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.7; }
    .badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 14px;
      border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 999px; background: #1f2937;
      color: #d1d5db; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; margin-top: 22px; color: var(--muted); font-size: 14px; }
    .chip {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 14px;
      border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px; background: #1f2937;
      transition: background .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
    }
    .chip:hover { background: #273244; transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .muted { color: var(--muted); }
    .pill-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }
    .pill {
      border: 1px solid var(--line); background: #1f2937; color: #cbd5e1;
      border-radius: 999px; padding: 9px 13px; font-size: 13px;
    }
    .edu-item { margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .edu-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #e5e7eb; }
    .edu-sub { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; }
    .two-col { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .knowledge-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 18px; }
    .knowledge-group h4 { margin: 0 0 10px; color: #d1d5db; font-size: 15px; }
    ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 20px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; }
    .qr-wrap { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding-top: 4px; }
    .qr {
      width: 168px; height: 168px; object-fit: contain; background: white;
      padding: 8px; border-radius: 14px; transition: transform .25s ease;
    }
    .qr:hover { transform: scale(1.04); }
    .job + .job { margin-top: 28px; }
    .job { border-left: 2px solid var(--line); padding-left: 18px; }
    .job-head {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .job-company { color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; }
    .job-period { color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; white-space: nowrap; }
    .job ul { margin-top: 10px; }
    .hover-text {
      border-radius: 10px; padding: 4px 6px; transition: background .25s ease;
    }
    .hover-text:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
    @media (max-width: 980px) {
      .grid-top, .two-col, .knowledge-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="langbar">
      <div class="switch">
        <span id="switchLabel">Language</span>
        <button class="btn" id="btnEs">ES</button>
        <button class="btn active" id="btnEn">EN</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <section class="grid-top">
      <div>
        <div class="badge" id="badge">Resume</div>
        <h1 id="name">Alejandro Salgado</h1>
        <p class="headline" id="headline">I focus on delivering clear, useful, and measurable results.</p>
        <div class="chips">
          <a class="chip" id="loc" href="#">📍 Tijuana, Mexico</a>
          <a class="chip" id="email" href="mailto:alejandro.sl28@outlook.com">✉️ alejandro.sl28@outlook.com</a>
          <a class="chip" id="phone" href="tel:+526221008568">📞 +52 6221008568</a>
          <a class="chip" id="linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandro-salgado-ab3b433a1?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=ios_app" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">🌐 LinkedIn</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card selectable" id="profileCard">
        <h2 id="profileTitle">Professional profile</h2>
        <p class="muted" id="profileText">Professional with experience in project management, quality operations, and process analysis.</p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="grid-top" style="grid-template-columns: .9fr 1.1fr;">
      <div class="stack">
        <div class="card selectable" id="skillsCard">
          <h2 id="skillsTitle">Skills</h2>
          <div class="pill-list" id="skillsList"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="card selectable" id="educationCard">
          <h2 id="educationTitle">Education</h2>
          <div id="educationList"></div>
          <div style="margin-top:18px">
            <p class="hover-text" id="certText" style="font-weight:600; color:#e5e7eb; white-space:pre-line;">Certified as an internal auditor in:
ISO 9001:2015
ISO 27001:2022</p>
            <p class="edu-sub" id="certSchool">BSI Mexico · 2025</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">
          <div class="card selectable" id="languagesCard">
            <h2 id="languagesTitle">Languages</h2>
            <div class="muted">
              <p class="hover-text" id="nativeLanguage">Spanish — Native</p>
              <p class="hover-text" id="secondLanguage">English — Intermediate</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="card selectable" id="valuesCard">
            <h2 id="valuesTitle">Values</h2>
            <div class="muted" id="valuesList"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="card selectable" id="knowledgeCard">
          <h2 id="knowledgeTitle">Other knowledge</h2>
          <div class="knowledge-grid" id="knowledgeGrid"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="card selectable" id="coursesCard">
          <h2 id="coursesTitle">Courses & Certifications</h2>
          <div class="qr-wrap">
            <a id="qrLink" href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Ex8AdPU3FkBr8rG9VbUiI1QaNkbTb4Qa" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">
              <img class="qr" id="qrImage" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="QR code for courses and certifications" />
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card selectable" id="experienceCard">
        <h2 id="experienceTitle">Work experience</h2>
        <div id="jobsList"></div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>

  <script>
    const content = {"es": {"badge": "Currículum", "name": "Alejandro Salgado", "headline": "Me enfoco en generar resultados claros, útiles y medibles.", "location": "Tijuana, México", "email": "alejandro.sl28@outlook.com", "phone": "+52 6221008568", "linkedinLabel": "LinkedIn", "linkedinHref": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandro-salgado-ab3b433a1?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=ios_app", "switchLabel": "Idioma", "spanish": "ES", "english": "EN", "profileTitle": "Perfil profesional", "profileText": "Profesional con experiencia en gestión de proyectos, operaciones de calidad y análisis de procesos. He trabajado en entornos corporativos dando seguimiento a iniciativas estratégicas, coordinando áreas multifuncionales y apoyando el cumplimiento de estándares de calidad y compliance para generar mejoras medibles.", "skillsTitle": "Habilidades", "skills": ["Liderazgo", "Comunicación", "Gestión de proyectos", "Análisis de datos", "Trabajo en equipo", "Resolución de problemas"], "educationTitle": "Educación", "education": [{"title": "Licenciatura en Negocios Internacionales", "subtitle": "Universidad Autónoma de Baja California · 2021 - 2025"}, {"title": "Biotecnología en Acuacultura (4 semestres)", "subtitle": "Universidad Autónoma de Baja California · 2018 - 2020"}, {"title": "Técnico en Recursos Humanos", "subtitle": "CBTIS 40 · 2015 - 2017"}], "cert": "Certificado como auditor interno en:\nISO 9001:2015\nISO 27001:2022", "certSchool": "BSI México · 2025", "languagesTitle": "Idiomas", "nativeLanguage": "Español — Nativo", "secondLanguage": "Inglés — Intermedio", "valuesTitle": "Valores", "values": ["Justicia", "Intensidad", "Perseverancia"], "knowledgeTitle": "Otros conocimientos", "knowledgeGroups": [{"title": "Herramientas y sistemas", "items": ["ServiceNow", "Workday", "Oracle JD Edwards", "Jira y Confluence", "Microsoft Teams, Excel, Power BI, Word y PowerPoint", "macOS"]}, {"title": "Metodologías y estándares", "items": ["Agile / Scrum / SAFe", "CAPA", "ISO 42001:2023", "GxP (Buenas prácticas de documentación)"]}, {"title": "Experiencia complementaria", "items": ["Experiencia laboral en IT", "Procesos corporativos y de recursos humanos", "Capacitaciones y talleres de negocio"]}], "coursesTitle": "Cursos y certificaciones", "qrAlt": "Código QR para cursos y certificaciones", "experienceTitle": "Experiencia laboral", "jobs": [{"role": "IT Project Manager", "company": "Thermo Fisher Scientific", "period": "2025 - Actualidad", "points": ["Seguimiento de proyectos enfocados en Compliance y Quality Operations.", "Coordinación con equipos multifuncionales para asegurar cumplimiento de tiempos, objetivos y requerimientos del negocio.", "Apoyo en iniciativas de mejora de procesos y visibilidad de avances mediante seguimiento estructurado.", "Participación en actividades relacionadas con calidad, seguridad de la información y cumplimiento organizacional."]}, {"role": "HR Analyst", "company": "Thermo Fisher Scientific", "period": "2023 - 2025", "points": ["Atención a colaboradores en temas de beneficios, nómina y políticas de recursos humanos por correo, llamadas y seguimiento de casos.", "Ejecución de transacciones operativas de back office para procesos de RH, reportes, solicitudes de servicio y soporte a sistemas.", "Participación en proyectos de implementación de sistemas y definición de roles y responsabilidades entre equipos globales y locales.", "Preparación de reportes, documentos, políticas y procesos para auditorías ISO 9001 e ISO 27001 en el área de HR Operations.", "Uso de ServiceNow para brindar soporte a colaboradores de las entidades de Thermo Fisher en México mediante tickets del Colleague Service Center.", "Recepción y procesamiento de facturas de proveedores de beneficios para la generación de órdenes de compra.", "Comunicación con proveedores para mejorar el servicio y la experiencia de colaboradores y socios externos.", "Participación voluntaria durante dos años en el ISO Core Team apoyando temas de Compliance.", "Participación como observador en auditorías externas, promoviendo buenas prácticas de calidad y seguridad."]}]}, "en": {"badge": "Resume", "name": "Alejandro Salgado", "headline": "I focus on delivering clear, useful, and measurable results.", "location": "Tijuana, Mexico", "email": "alejandro.sl28@outlook.com", "phone": "+52 6221008568", "linkedinLabel": "LinkedIn", "linkedinHref": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandro-salgado-ab3b433a1?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=ios_app", "switchLabel": "Language", "spanish": "ES", "english": "EN", "profileTitle": "Professional profile", "profileText": "Professional with experience in project management, quality operations, and process analysis. I have worked in corporate environments supporting strategic initiatives, coordinating cross-functional areas, and contributing to quality and compliance standards to generate measurable improvements.", "skillsTitle": "Skills", "skills": ["Leadership", "Communication", "Project management", "Data analysis", "Teamwork", "Problem solving"], "educationTitle": "Education", "education": [{"title": "Bachelor's Degree in International Business", "subtitle": "Autonomous University of Baja California · 2021 - 2025"}, {"title": "Biotechnology in Aquaculture (4 semesters)", "subtitle": "Autonomous University of Baja California · 2018 - 2020"}, {"title": "HR Technician", "subtitle": "CBTIS 40 · 2015 - 2017"}], "cert": "Certified as an internal auditor in:\nISO 9001:2015\nISO 27001:2022", "certSchool": "BSI Mexico · 2025", "languagesTitle": "Languages", "nativeLanguage": "Spanish — Native", "secondLanguage": "English — Intermediate", "valuesTitle": "Values", "values": ["Justice", "Intensity", "Perseverance"], "knowledgeTitle": "Other knowledge", "knowledgeGroups": [{"title": "Tools & Systems", "items": ["ServiceNow", "Workday", "Oracle JD Edwards", "Jira & Confluence", "Microsoft Teams, Excel, Power BI, Word, and PowerPoint", "macOS"]}, {"title": "Methodologies & Standards", "items": ["Agile / Scrum / SAFe", "CAPA", "ISO 42001:2023", "GxP (Good Documentation Practices)"]}, {"title": "Additional experience", "items": ["IT work experience", "HR and corporate processes", "Business training sessions and workshops"]}], "coursesTitle": "Courses & Certifications", "qrAlt": "QR code for courses and certifications", "experienceTitle": "Work experience", "jobs": [{"role": "IT Project Manager", "company": "Thermo Fisher Scientific", "period": "2025 - Present", "points": ["Tracking projects focused on Compliance and Quality Operations.", "Coordinating with cross-functional teams to ensure timelines, goals, and business requirements were met.", "Supporting process improvement initiatives and project visibility through structured follow-up.", "Contributing to activities related to quality, information security, and organizational compliance."]}, {"role": "HR Analyst", "company": "Thermo Fisher Scientific", "period": "2023 - 2025", "points": ["Supporting employees with benefits, payroll, and HR policies by responding to emails, calls, and case follow-up.", "Performing back-office transactions for HR processes, reporting, service requests, and systems support.", "Participating in system implementation projects and in defining roles and responsibilities across global and local teams.", "Preparing reports, documents, policies, and processes to support ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 audits in HR Operations.", "Using ServiceNow to support employees across Thermo Fisher entities in Mexico through Colleague Service Center tickets.", "Receiving and processing benefits provider invoices to support purchase order generation.", "Communicating with suppliers to improve service quality and the experience of employees and external partners.", "Volunteering for two years on the ISO Core Team supporting Compliance-related activities.", "Participating as an observer in external audits, promoting strong quality and security practices."]}]}};
    const state = {
      language: "en",
    };

    const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

    function render() {
      const t = content[state.language];

      el("switchLabel").textContent = t.switchLabel;
      el("badge").textContent = t.badge;
      el("name").textContent = t.name;
      el("headline").textContent = t.headline;
      el("profileTitle").textContent = t.profileTitle;
      el("profileText").textContent = t.profileText;
      el("skillsTitle").textContent = t.skillsTitle;
      el("educationTitle").textContent = t.educationTitle;
      el("languagesTitle").textContent = t.languagesTitle;
      el("valuesTitle").textContent = t.valuesTitle;
      el("knowledgeTitle").textContent = t.knowledgeTitle;
      el("coursesTitle").textContent = t.coursesTitle;
      el("experienceTitle").textContent = t.experienceTitle;
      el("certText").textContent = t.cert;
      el("certSchool").textContent = t.certSchool;
      el("nativeLanguage").textContent = t.nativeLanguage;
      el("secondLanguage").textContent = t.secondLanguage;
      el("linkedin").textContent = "🌐 " + t.linkedinLabel;
      el("linkedin").href = t.linkedinHref;
      el("email").textContent = "✉️ " + t.email;
      el("email").href = "mailto:" + t.email;
      el("phone").textContent = "📞 " + t.phone;
      el("phone").href = "tel:" + t.phone.replace(/\\s+/g, "");
      el("loc").textContent = "📍 " + t.location;

      el("btnEs").className = state.language === "es" ? "btn active" : "btn";
      el("btnEn").className = state.language === "en" ? "btn active" : "btn";

      el("skillsList").innerHTML = t.skills.map(s => `<span class="pill hover-text">${s}</span>`).join("");
      el("educationList").innerHTML = t.education.map(item => `
        <div class="edu-item">
          <div class="edu-title hover-text">${item.title}</div>
          <div class="edu-sub hover-text">${item.subtitle}</div>
        </div>
      `).join("");
      el("valuesList").innerHTML = t.values.map(v => `<p class="hover-text">${v}</p>`).join("");

      el("knowledgeGrid").innerHTML = t.knowledgeGroups.map(group => `
        <div class="knowledge-group">
          <h4 class="hover-text">${group.title}</h4>
          <ul>
            ${group.items.map(item => `<li class="hover-text">${item}</li>`).join("")}
          </ul>
        </div>
      `).join("");

      el("jobsList").innerHTML = t.jobs.map(job => `
        <article class="job">
          <div class="job-head">
            <div>
              <h3 class="hover-text">${job.role}</h3>
              <p class="job-company hover-text">${job.company}</p>
            </div>
            <span class="job-period">${job.period}</span>
          </div>
          <ul>
            ${job.points.map(point => `<li class="hover-text">${point}</li>`).join("")}
          </ul>
        </article>
      `).join("");
    }

    function setLanguage(lang) {
      state.language = lang;
      localStorage.setItem("cv-language", lang);
      render();
    }

    el("btnEs").addEventListener("click", () => setLanguage("es"));
    el("btnEn").addEventListener("click", () => setLanguage("en"));

    [
      "profileCard",
      "skillsCard",
      "educationCard",
      "languagesCard",
      "valuesCard",
      "knowledgeCard",
      "coursesCard",
      "experienceCard",
    ].forEach((id) => {
      const node = el(id);
      node.addEventListener("click", () => {
        document.querySelectorAll(".card").forEach((card) => card.classList.remove("active"));
        node.classList.add("active");
      });
    });

    const saved = localStorage.getItem("cv-language");
    if (saved === "es" || saved === "en") {
      state.language = saved;
    } else {
      state.language = navigator.language?.toLowerCase().startsWith("es") ? "es" : "en";
    }

    render();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
